name: Claude Code
description: Installs Claude Code CLI and optionally configures plugin marketplaces, plugins, attribution settings and custom statusline.

marketplace.description: Comma-separated list of plugin marketplaces to register. Each entry accepts owner/repo shorthand (e.g. obra/superpowers-marketplace) or a full GitHub URL (e.g. https://github.com/obra/superpowers-marketplace). Skipped when empty.

plugin.description: Comma-separated list of plugins to install after marketplaces are configured. Each entry accepts plugin-name@marketplace-name format (e.g. superpowers@superpowers-marketplace) or a full GitHub URL. Skipped when empty.

removeAttribution.description: When true, injects empty commit and pr attribution strings into ~/.claude/settings.json, suppressing Co-Authored-By lines from Claude Code commits.

statusline.description: When true, installs statusline.sh to ~/.claude/statusline-command.sh and configures it as the Claude Code status line in ~/.claude/settings.json.
